creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text: The latest 13-STABLE (FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #8 stable/13-n246370-74ff46ac172: Sun Jul 18 11:18:45 CEST 2021 amd64) is now up for almost three hours without any crash. So it might be correct, that with July, 14th 2021 a set of solving patches arrived in 13-STABLE.
